Appearance:
George Ellard plaintiff and moving party: Katherine Taylor
Peggy S. Doyle for Defendant and opposing party: Budget Rent A Car System, Inc.

Hearing held and Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Deposition/Document Production Of Budget Of Fresno, AKA Budget Car And Truck Rental, AKA Budget Rent A Car System, Inc., and Request For Sanctions is Granted as to Budget of Fresno. Budget of Fresno is ordered to appear for deposition on a date to be noticed by plaintiff on shortened time and to be completed no later than 9/22/06. Sanctions are awarded against Budget of Fresno in the amount of $2,080 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Sanctions denied as to Budget Rent A Car. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depostion/Document Production And Further Responses And Documents Pursuant To Pltf'S Request For Production, Set One To The Budget/Ryder Defts;Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
George W. Ellard; Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving party
No other appearance.
Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Katherine Taylor's Motion To Compel Depositions and Document Production and Further Responses and Documents Pursuant To Plaintiff's Request For Production, Set One, To The Budget and Ryerder Defendants is granted as it seeks the depositions and as it seeks a log for any documents withheld on grounds of privilege. The court is unable to determine the claims of privilege on this motion. The documents being withheld must be identified with specificity and evidentiary showings must be made supporting and contesting those claims of privilege. The depositions shall be scheduled after meet and confer and to be set for dates no later than May 19, 2006. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
